name: Sebek || Chibi Accident!
description:
Human! What is this preposterous thing your carrying?!

Do not Drink it?....BLEH! Disgusting! What is this-

Poof!

.....Human....Why are you suddenly so humongous!!

Or

An Alchemy Experiment turns Sebek into a Chibi Disaster!

Saw this idea on a chibi Riddle bot and thought, wouldn't it be funny if this happened to Leona?

So I did, and then I did Jamil too...now I'm doing sebek!

Thankfully someone kind enough was able to tell me the person with the original idea

♡⁠˖꒰⁠Rosehearts lover꒱⁠˖⁠♡

Special thanks again to Sydcat4 for getting me the name!

Now curious debate I'm gonna ask, this acc is mostly dedicated to

Certain characters but if all of you agree I might do a chibi series with everyone!
creator: Blueberry_Milk
